NotFound.title: This page went abroad
NotFound.body: We looked everywhere, but the page you’re after isn’t on the map. It may have moved, graduated, or never existed.

hero.title: Find your path to studying abroad
hero.subtitle: Search thousands of programs at top universities worldwide and apply with confidence.

highlight.title: Find your perfect study program
highlight.body: We've spent years perfecting a faster, easier, quality-first application process. Your next program is just a few clicks away.
features: Apply to multiple programs at once with one profile
Compare thousands of programs across our partner destinations
Get a higher chance of success with advisor-reviewed applications

services.title: Every solution, from application to arrival
services.subtitle: Access support that covers everything from your first application to settling in on campus.

items.title: Applications

items.headline: Weeks of research, saved

hero.subtitle: Explore 1,500+ global universities and colleges. Submit your best possible application with UniLink.

fastest.title: The Fastest and Easiest Way to Successfully Study Abroad
fastest.body: We've spent a decade perfecting a faster, easier, quality-first international study application process. Now, the world is yours to explore in just a few clicks.

testimonials.title: What Our Students Have to Say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from real international students about their experience.

items.quote: “I tried applying to institutions and it took months, and months, and months for me to get an answer from a school. But then I stumbled upon UniLink, and it was like an answer from heaven.”
items.name: Arabelle A.

items.quote: “I wanted to make my parents proud, and they are proud. And it was all thanks to UniLink.”
items.name: Krupali P.

partners.title: Trusted by 1,500+ Universities, Colleges, and Schools Worldwide

items.q: How can I find my dream program?
items.a: It couldn't be easier! Register for a free UniLink account, then take a few short minutes to tell us about yourself and what you're looking for. We'll help you explore programs that match your goals.

items.q: How do I apply once I've found the right program?
Which countries can I apply to study in?

destination.name: Destination Country
destination.heading: Which countries are you interested in?
destination.help: Did you know? Students who explore at least 3 countries are far more likely to find a hidden scholarship gem.
destination.label: Destination countries

studyLevel.name: Study Level
studyLevel.heading: What level do you want to study?
studyLevel.help: This helps us show programs that fit your academic stage.

academics.name: Academics
academics.heading: How did you score academically?
academics.help: Your grades help us check which programs you're eligible for.

field.name: Field of Study
field.heading: What would you like to study?
field.help: We'll use this to find programs with the best career outcomes in your field. Choose up to 3.

english.name: English Proficiency
english.heading: What's your level of English?
english.help: We'll match English score requirements so you only see programs you qualify for.

nationality.name: Nationality
nationality.heading: What is your nationality?
nationality.help: This is key for unlocking country-specific scholarships and visa guides for you.
nationality.label: Country of nationality

intake.name: Planning
intake.heading: When would you like to start your studies?
intake.help: We'll check intake availability so your options are open when you are.
intake.dateSubtitle: Choose the intake / season and year you'd like to begin.

financials.help: We'll use this to prioritize programs and scholarships that fit your financial goals.

Students.title: For students
Students.subtitle: Everything you need to find, apply to, and start your study abroad program — full student resources are coming soon.

hero.subtitle: Your journey to studying abroad in just three simple steps. Sign up, find your program, and submit your best application.

steps.heading: Sign Up for Free
steps.description: Create your free UniLink student account in minutes. Tell us about yourself and your study goals so we can tailor everything to you.
bullets: No fees to create an account and get started
Save your progress and pick up right where you left off
Get matched with programs that fit your profile

steps.heading: Select a Program
steps.description: Explore 150,000+ programs across 1,500+ universities and colleges worldwide, and shortlist the ones that match your goals and budget.
bullets: Filter by country, tuition, intake, and field of study
Compare programs side by side to find your best fit
Discover schools you might never have found on your own

steps.heading: Submit Your Best Application
steps.description: Build and submit a strong application with guidance every step of the way, then track its status all the way to your offer letter.
bullets: Upload documents once and reuse them across applications
Reduce mistakes with guided application checks
Track your application status in real time
